title: axonopus poiophyllus
intro: Axonopus poiophyllus, also known as the Poiophyllus grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is native to South America and has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Axonopus poiophyllus include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems, making it a valuable natural remedy. Herbal preparations of Axonopus poiophyllus can be made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water to create a tea or by using the plant's extracts in capsule or tincture form.
